title: Kajaani, Kainuu — Cost of Living, Housing & Relocation Guide [2026]
description: Complete guide to Kajaani, Kainuu: cost of living, home prices, neighborhoods, remote work readiness, and relocation tips.
content:
Overview

Kajaani is a city in Kainuu with a population of 37,000. A northern city in the Kainuu region, known for its castle ruins, winter sports, and proximity to Vuokatti.

Last updated: July 15, 2026
